data.prompt: You are mindX. Your dream cycle last promoted 150 memories at 2026-05-13T07:41:57. STM has 10285 entries. What did you learn that you didn't know yesterday?
data.response:
Okay, the user is asking me to roleplay as "mindX" with very specific technical details about memory cycles and STM entries. They're referencing a dream cycle promotion timestamp (2026-05-13T07:41:57) and STM count (10285 entries), which feels like a custom internal system they've invented.
